Pilger, R. 1935. Santalaceae in Engler, Natürlichen Pflanzenfamilien ed. 2, 16b: 52-91.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 27 June 2021

species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 356 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 114; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 13.
species.distribution: Australia, Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. BASILAN, BOHOL (photos), CEBU (photos), CULION, DANJUGAN (photos), HOMONHON, HUNDRED ISLS (photos), JOLO, LUZON: Albay, Ilocos, Ilocos Norte, Pangasinan, Zambales, MINDANAO: Davao Oriental, PALAWAN, SIBUTU, TAMLANGON.

species.citation: (L.) Endl. , Ann. Wiener Mus. Naturgesch. 1 (1836) 167; ≡ Xylophylla longifolia L. , Mant. Pl. Altera (1771) 221. = Exocarpos rolfeanus (Kuntze) Merr. , PJS 4c (1909) 253; ≡ Xylophyllos rolfeanus Kuntze , Revis. Gen. Pl. 2 (1891) 589.
species.distribution: Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Vietnam. PALAWAN.
